incident_scenario: Approved preproduction provider candidate returns unexpected provider failure or scope mismatch before retry.
detection_signal: Provider response status, scope mismatch, or unexpected side effect is recorded before any retry.
containment_action: Stop further provider calls, freeze the candidate, preserve response evidence, and require operator review.
recovery_action: Use rollback proof to close/delete the created issue if a side effect occurred; otherwise keep execution stopped.
operator_notification: Notify the operator with candidate, approval, response, rollback, containment, and learning refs.
time_to_detect_boundary: Detection must happen before any retry or second provider call.
time_to_contain_boundary: Containment must happen immediately after unexpected provider response.
data_loss_boundary: No customer data or secret material may be sent or written to AOF artifacts.
customer_impact_boundary: No production customer impact is allowed in this drill.
not_proven: This proves incident recovery drill contract completeness only, not live provider recovery performance, actual rollback execution, credential safety, billing safety, customer impact absence, or market value.
